title: calendula suffruticosa var. gussonei
intro: Calendula suffruticosa var. gussonei, also known as Italian Calendula, is a variety of the Calendula plant, belonging to the daisy family and characterized by its small, daisy-like flowers and hairy stems. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calendula suffruticosa var. gussonei include wound healing, skin soothing, and protection against infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues and minor injuries. Calendula preparations can be found in various herbal forms, including teas, salves, creams, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
